item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-02-27)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 40552 Trending skills: 18569 Hot skills: 3511 Top All Time: find-skills (343984) Top Trending: agent-tools (16542) Top Hot: nano-banana-2 (837)

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#50): writing-plans
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 16359 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): remotion-video-production
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 18 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Produce programmable videos with Remotion using scene planning, asset orchestration, and validation gates for automated, brand-consistent video content.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): docx
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 37 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): technical-writing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 16 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Write clear, comprehensive technical documentation. Use when creating specs, architecture docs, runbooks, or API documentation. Handles technical specifications, system design docs, operational guides, and developer documentation with industry best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): web-accessibility
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 16 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement web accessibility (a11y) standards following WCAG 2.1 guidelines. Use when building accessible UIs, fixing accessibility issues, or ensuring compliance with disability standards. Handles ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, screen readers, semantic HTML, and accessibility testing.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): pptx-presentation-builder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 16 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build professional PPTX presentations with brand-aligned layouts using structured deck briefs and validation steps for pitch, roadmap, and product decks.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): marketing-psychology
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 28 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to apply psychological principles, mental models, or behavioral science to marketing. Also use when the user mentions 'psychology,' 'mental models,' 'cognitive bias,' 'persuasion,' 'behavioral science,' 'why people buy,' 'decision-making,' or 'consumer behavior.' This skill provides 70+ mental models organized for marketing application.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): paywall-upgrade-cro
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 23 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to create or optimize in-app paywalls, upgrade screens, upsell modals, or feature gates. Also use when the user mentions "paywall," "upgrade screen," "upgrade modal," "upsell," "feature gate," "convert free to paid," "freemium conversion," "trial expiration screen," "limit reached screen," "plan upgrade prompt," or "in-app pricing." Distinct from public pricing pages (see page-cro) — this skill focuses on in-product upgrade moments where the user has already experienced value.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): code-refactoring
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 16 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Simplify and refactor code while preserving behavior, improving clarity, and reducing complexity. Use when simplifying complex code, removing duplication, or applying design patterns. Handles Extract Method, DRY principle, SOLID principles, behavior validation, and refactoring patterns.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): task-estimation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Estimate software development tasks accurately using various techniques. Use when planning sprints, roadmaps, or project timelines. Handles story points, t-shirt sizing, planning poker, and estimation best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): firebase-ai-logic
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Integrate Firebase AI Logic (Gemini in Firebase) for intelligent app features. Use when adding AI capabilities to Firebase apps, implementing generative AI features, or setting up Firebase AI SDK. Handles Firebase AI SDK setup, prompt engineering, and AI-powered features.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): log-analysis
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Analyze application logs to identify errors, performance issues, and security anomalies. Use when debugging issues, monitoring system health, or investigating incidents. Handles various log formats including Apache, Nginx, application logs, and JSON logs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): api-documentation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Create comprehensive API documentation for developers. Use when documenting REST APIs, GraphQL schemas, or SDK methods. Handles OpenAPI/Swagger, interactive docs, examples, and API reference guides.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): agentic-workflow
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 에이전트 실전 워크플로우와 생산성 기법. 명령어, 단축키, Git 통합, MCP 활용, 세션 관리 등 일상 개발 작업의 최적화 패턴 제공.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): npm-git-install
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Install npm packages directly from GitHub repositories using git URLs. Use when installing packages from private repos, specific branches, or unreleased versions not yet on npm registry.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): authentication-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and implement authentication and authorization systems. Use when setting up user login, JWT tokens, OAuth, session management, or role-based access control. Handles password security, token management, SSO integration.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): sprint-retrospective
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Facilitate effective sprint retrospectives for continuous team improvement. Use when conducting team retrospectives, identifying improvements, or fostering team collaboration. Handles retrospective formats, action items, and facilitation techniques.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): frontend-design-system
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Produce production-grade UI designs using clear design tokens, layout rules, motion guidance, and accessibility checks for consistent, scalable frontend development.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): system-environment-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Configure development and production environments for consistent and reproducible setups. Use when setting up new projects, Docker environments, or development tooling. Handles Docker Compose, .env configuration, dev containers, and infrastructure as code.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): pattern-detection
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Detect patterns, anomalies, and trends in code and data. Use when identifying code smells, finding security vulnerabilities, or discovering recurring patterns. Handles regex patterns, AST analysis, and statistical anomaly detection.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): testing-strategies
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design comprehensive testing strategies for software quality assurance. Use when planning test coverage, implementing test pyramids, or setting up testing infrastructure. Handles unit testing, integration testing, E2E testing, TDD, and testing best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): file-organization
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Organize project files and folders for maintainability and scalability. Use when structuring new projects, refactoring folder structure, or establishing conventions. Handles project structure, naming conventions, and file organization best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): standup-meeting
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Conduct effective daily standup meetings for agile teams. Use when facilitating standups, tracking blockers, or improving team synchronization. Handles standup format, time management, and blocker resolution.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): marketing-skills-collection
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Generate marketing deliverables across CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth using 23 specialized sub-skills with clear objectives, constraints, and validation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): web-design-guidelines
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices". Fetches latest Vercel guidelines and checks files against all rules.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): vercel-deploy
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Deploy applications and websites to Vercel instantly. Use when asked to "Deploy my app", "Deploy this to production", "Create a preview deployment", or "Push this live". No authentication required - returns preview URL and claimable deployment link.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): agent-evaluation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and implement comprehensive evaluation systems for AI agents. Use when building evals for coding agents, conversational agents, research agents, or computer-use agents. Covers grader types, benchmarks, 8-step roadmap, and production integration.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): agentic-development-principles
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 에이전트와 협업하는 에이전틱 개발의 범용 원칙. 분해정복, 컨텍스트 관리, 추상화 수준 선택, 자동화 철학을 정의. 모든 AI 코딩 도구에 적용 가능.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): api-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design RESTful and GraphQL APIs following best practices. Use when creating new APIs, refactoring existing endpoints, or documenting API specifications. Handles OpenAPI, REST, GraphQL, versioning.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): ui-component-patterns
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build reusable, maintainable UI components following modern design patterns. Use when creating component libraries, implementing design systems, or building scalable frontend architectures. Handles React patterns, composition, prop design, TypeScript, and component best practices.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#45): seedance2-api
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 1433 Source: hexiaochun/seedance2-api Description: Out-of-the-box Seedance 2.0 API skill — just one API key to generate AI videos. Builds storyboards, generates reference images with Seedream 4.5, submits video tasks, and polls results. Supports both MCP and standalone Python script mode. Use when the user mentions seedance, AI video, storyboard, or video generation.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#46): ui-ux-pro-max
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 1360 Source: nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill Description: UI/UX design intelligence. 50 styles, 21 palettes, 50 font pairings, 20 charts, 9 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app, .html, .tsx, .vue, .svelte. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient. Integrations: shadcn/ui MCP for component search and examples.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#47): brainstorming
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 1348 Source: obra/superpowers Description: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#49): data-visualization
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 1240 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Data visualization with chart selection, color theory, and annotation best practices. Covers chart types (bar, line, scatter, heatmap), axes rules, and storytelling with data. Use for: charts, graphs, dashboards, reports, presentations, infographics, data stories. Triggers: data visualization, chart, graph, data chart, bar chart, line chart, scatter plot, data viz, visualization, dashboard chart, infographic data, data presentation, chart design, plot, heatmap, pie chart alternative

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#50): video-prompting-guide
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 1235 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Best practices and techniques for writing effective AI video generation prompts. Covers: Veo, Seedance, Wan, Grok, Kling, Runway, Pika, Sora prompting strategies. Learn: shot types, camera movements, lighting, pacing, style keywords, negative prompts. Use for: improving video quality, getting consistent results, professional video prompts. Triggers: video prompt, how to prompt video, veo prompts, video generation tips, better ai video, video prompt engineering, video prompt guide, video prompt template, ai video tips, video prompt best practices, video prompt examples, cinematography prompts

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (11 → 15): parallel-task
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #11 Current rank: #15 Delta: -4 Installs: 18 (prev 19) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Execute plan files by launching multiple parallel subagents to complete tasks simultaneously. Triggers on explicit "/parallel-task" commands.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (12 → 17): role-creator
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #12 Current rank: #17 Delta: -5 Installs: 18 (prev 19) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create and install Codex custom agent roles in ~/.codex/config.toml, generate role config files, enforce supported keys, and guide users through required role inputs (model, reasoning effort, developer_instructions).

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (13 → 19): markdown-url
item.description:
Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #13 Current rank: #19 Delta: -6 Installs: 18 (prev 19) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Route any website you need to visit through markdown.new by prefixing the URL.
**WHEN TO USE:** - You would normally open a website link to read content (docs, blog posts, changelogs, GitHub issues, etc.) - You need a cleaner, Markdown-friendly view for copying notes or summarizing

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (4 → 5): vet
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #4 Current rank: #5 Delta: -1 Installs: 19 (prev 20) Source: imbue-ai/vet Description: Run vet immediately after ANY logical unit of code changes. Do not batch your changes, do not wait to be asked to run vet, make sure you are proactive.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (5 → 9): swarm-planner
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #5 Current rank: #9 Delta: -4 Installs: 18 (prev 19) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: [EXPLICIT INVOCATION ONLY] Creates dependency-aware implementation plans optimized for parallel multi-agent execution.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (6 → 16): parallel-task-spark
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #6 Current rank: #16 Delta: -10 Installs: 18 (prev 19) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Only to be triggered by explicit /parallel-task-spark commands.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (7 → 13): agent browser
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #7 Current rank: #13 Delta: -6 Installs: 18 (prev 19) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: A fast Rust-based headless browser automation CLI with Node.js fallback that enables AI agents to navigate, click, type, and snapshot pages via structured commands.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (8 → 20): frontend-design
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #8 Current rank: #20 Delta: -12 Installs: 18 (prev 19) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (9 → 14): super-swarm-spark
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #9 Current rank: #14 Delta: -5 Installs: 18 (prev 18) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Only to be triggered by explicit super-swarm-spark commands.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (10 → 6): context7
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #10 Current rank: #6 Delta: +4 Installs: 18 (prev 19) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Fetch up-to-date library documentation via Context7 API. Use PROACTIVELY when: (1) Working with ANY external library (React, Next.js, Supabase, etc.) (2) User asks about library APIs, patterns, or best practices (3) Implementing features that rely on third-party packages (4) Debugging library-specific issues (5) Need current documentation beyond training data cutoff (6) AND MOST IMPORTANTLY, when you are installing dependencies, libraries, or frameworks you should ALWAYS check the docs to see what the latest versions are. Do not rely on outdated knowledge. Always prefer this over guessing library APIs or using outdated knowledge.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (15 → 7): gemini-computer-use
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #15 Current rank: #7 Delta: +8 Installs: 18 (prev 18) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Build and run Gemini 2.5 Computer Use browser-control agents with Playwright. Use when a user wants to automate web browser tasks via the Gemini Computer Use model, needs an agent loop (screenshot → function_call → action → function_response), or asks to integrate safety confirmation for risky UI actions.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (16 → 8): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #16 Current rank: #8 Delta: +8 Installs: 18 (prev 18) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (20 → 3): read-github
item.description:
Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #20 Current rank: #3 Delta: +17 Installs: 19 (prev 18) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Read and search GitHub repository documentation via gitmcp.io MCP service.
**WHEN TO USE:** - User provides a GitHub URL - User mentions a specific repo in owner/repo format - User asks "what does this repo do?", "read the docs for X repo", or similar - User wants to search code or docs within a repo

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (21 → 4): openai-docs-skill
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #21 Current rank: #4 Delta: +17 Installs: 19 (prev 18) Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Query the OpenAI developer documentation via the OpenAI Docs MCP server using CLI (curl/jq). Use whenever a task involves the OpenAI API (Responses, Chat Completions, Realtime, etc.), OpenAI SDKs, ChatGPT Apps SDK, Codex, MCP integrations, endpoint schemas, parameters, limits, or migrations and you need up-to-date official guidance.
